concise_touch.label: Quick check-in
concise_touch.prompt: Prepare a short, natural client check-in. Keep it factual and relationship-led.

required: soft timing question at the end
template: Hi {firstName},
I am preparing a short service update for you.
One item I will include: {signal}.
Would a brief check-in this week be convenient?

meeting_confirm.label: Appointment confirmation
meeting_confirm.prompt: Confirm a meeting or call time. Keep it simple and avoid portfolio claims.

template: Hi {firstName},
Just checking whether our review slot still works for you.
I will prepare the latest supporting details before we speak.
Would the current timing still be convenient?

review_followup.label: Follow-up note
review_followup.prompt: Prepare a brief follow-up after a client review. This legacy key is kept for older deep links.

template: Hi {firstName},
I am preparing your review note. Current status: {reviewLabel}.
I will also include the latest context for {topProductName}.
Would a short review call this week be suitable?

formal_note.label: Portfolio change proposal
formal_note.prompt: Prepare client-facing wording for a formal portfolio change discussion. Do not imply implementation before client instruction and internal review.

template: Hi {firstName},
I am preparing a portfolio change proposal for your review.
One item I would like to review with you is: {signal}.
Please let me know a suitable time for a short check-in.

client_review_pack.label: Client Review Pack
client_review_pack.prompt: Merge client report and financial plan into one review pack. Cover relationship context, portfolio snapshot, lifecycle items, planning questions, and next service steps. Do not make investment decisions.

template: Hi {firstName},
I am preparing a Client Review Pack for your next discussion.
It will cover {signal} and the latest portfolio context.
Would you like me to send the PDF before our call?

tax_loss_harvesting.label: Tax opportunity scan
tax_loss_harvesting.prompt: Prepare a tax-aware opportunity scan for RM and client review. Use placeholders for local tax rules and avoid giving tax advice.

template: Hi {firstName},
I am preparing a tax-aware portfolio scan for review.
It will identify items to check with the relevant tax professional.
Would you like this included in our next discussion?

earnings_analysis.label: Earnings / lifecycle analysis
earnings_analysis.prompt: Prepare an earnings or lifecycle analysis for product maturity, quarterly review, or annual review. Explain what changed and why it matters to the relationship context.

template: Hi {firstName},
I am preparing a short lifecycle update for your review.
It will cover {signal} and any upcoming maturity or review items.
Would you like me to include this in our next discussion?

phone_opener.label: Opener
phone_opener.prompt: Prepare a phone opener with relationship context, one reason for the call, and a permission-based close.

maturity_reminder.label: Maturity reminder
maturity_reminder.prompt: Prepare a phone script for a product or deposit maturity reminder. Keep it neutral and timing-led.

meeting_scheduling.label: Meeting scheduling
meeting_scheduling.prompt: Prepare a phone script to schedule a client meeting. Keep it short and service-led.
